name: magnetic-button
title: Magnetic Button
description: Cursor-reactive movement that adds a tactile pull to any child button.
docs:
# Magnetic Button
Cursor-reactive movement that adds a tactile pull to any child button.
## Import
```tsx
import { MagneticButton } from "@/components/ui/magnetic-button";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<MagneticButton strength={0.35}>
  <Button>Test Me</Button>
</MagneticButton>
```
## Props
- **label** (string) — default: `"Test Me"`: Label
- **strength** (number) — default: `0.35`: Strength
- **label** (string) — default: `"Test Me"`: Label
- **rippleColor** (string): Ripple color
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add magnetic-button
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/magnetic-button
```
